panel.description: Card and panel surfaces, brighter than page

ambient.use: Card hover, dropdown menus, drag previews

modal.use: Dialog backdrops and modal surfaces only

buttonPrimary.css: background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out;

buttonSecondary.css: background: transparent; color: var(--ink); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; cursor: pointer;

card.css: background: var(--panel); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: none;

input.css: background: var(--page); color: var(--ink); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; outline: none;

tabs.tabButton: border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; background: transparent; color: var(--ink); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--line); border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms ease-out;

progressBar.css: height: 6px; background: var(--line); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; cursor: ew-resize; user-select: none;
progressBar.fill: height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 3px; pointer-events: none;

dragHandle.css: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 24px; cursor: grab; color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; user-select: none; border-radius: 4px; opacity: 0.3;

namedRules.oneAccent: The accent color appears on at most 10% of any screen. A button, a selected tab, a checked box.
namedRules.noPureWhite: Every light surface is tinted toward the brand temperature. Pure #ffffff and #000000 are prohibited.
namedRules.ghostBorder: Borders are 1px solid, in neutral-line. Color emphasis comes from background tints, not side borders.
namedRules.weightOnly: Hierarchy is created through font weight and size alone. Never through color alone on the same size.
namedRules.flatByDefault: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus, drag).
namedRules.onePxMaximum: No border or outline exceeds 1px. Grouping and separation come from space and background tonal shifts.

narrative.scene: A single sheet of premium paper under even light. The interface recedes until only the task remains.
narrative.aesthetic: Precision without coldness. Flat surfaces, cool off-white background with barely perceptible warmth. One accent color signals action. Typography does the heavy lifting through weight contrast.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces with minimal elevation; shadows appear only on hover or drag
One accent color used on less than 10% of any given screen
No dividers; space alone separates sections
Cool off-white background tinted just enough to not read as pure white

electron.comment: Replace current warm paper tokens with these
